'''鈭歷-th-g''' ('''vathaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yen|yen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yen|yen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-th-g
|-
! Lemma
| vathaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vathagithi|vathagithi]] || [[word:vathagiji|vathagiji]] || [[word:vathagishi|vathagishi]] || [[word:vathagi|vathagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathaguthuth|vathaguthuth]] || [[word:vathagujuj|vathagujuj]] || [[word:vathagushush|vathagushush]] || [[word:vathag|vathag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathaguthu|vathaguthu]] || [[word:vathaguju|vathaguju]] || [[word:vathagushu|vathagushu]] || [[word:vathagu|vathagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathagufuth|vathagufuth]] || [[word:vathagufuj|vathagufuj]] || [[word:vathagufush|vathagufush]] || [[word:vathaguf|vathaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vathagethe|vathagethe]] || [[word:vathageje|vathageje]] || [[word:vathageshe|vathageshe]] || [[word:vathage|vathage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathagothoth|vathagothoth]] || [[word:vathagojoj|vathagojoj]] || [[word:vathagoshosh|vathagoshosh]] || [[word:vathag|vathag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathagotho|vathagotho]] || [[word:vathagojo|vathagojo]] || [[word:vathagosho|vathagosho]] || [[word:vathago|vathago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathagofoth|vathagofoth]] || [[word:vathagofoj|vathagofoj]] || [[word:vathagofosh|vathagofosh]] || [[word:vathagof|vathagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vathag忙th忙|vathag忙th忙]] || [[word:vathag忙j忙|vathag忙j忙]] || [[word:vathag忙sh忙|vathag忙sh忙]] || [[word:vathag忙|vathag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathagathath|vathagathath]] || [[word:vathagajaj|vathagajaj]] || [[word:vathagashash|vathagashash]] || [[word:vathag|vathag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathagatha|vathagatha]] || [[word:vathagaja|vathagaja]] || [[word:vathagasha|vathagasha]] || [[word:vathaga|vathaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathagafath|vathagafath]] || [[word:vathagafaj|vathagafaj]] || [[word:vathagafash|vathagafash]] || [[word:vathagaf|vathagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vathagasha|vathagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govathagasha|govathagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivathagasha|gokivathagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vathagn眉sha|vathagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govathagnkn眉sha|govathagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivathagn眉sha|gokivathagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vathagsh毛sha|vathagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govathagnksh毛sha|govathagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivathagsh毛sha|gokivathagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathagrosha|vathagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathagnkrosha|govathagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathagrosha|gokivathagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vathagmusha|vathagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govathagnkmusha|govathagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathagmusha|gokivathagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vathagsherasha|vathagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govathagnksherasha|govathagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivathagsherasha|gokivathagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vathagngasha|vathagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govathagnkngasha|govathagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivathagngasha|gokivathagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vathagyasha|vathagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govathagnkyasha|govathagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivathagyasha|gokivathagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vathagyamasha|vathagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govathagnkyamasha|govathagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivathagyamasha|gokivathagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vathagn眉sh毛sha|vathagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govathagnkn眉sh毛sha|govathagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivathagn眉sh毛sha|gokivathagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathagn眉rosha|vathagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathagnkn眉rosha|govathagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathagn眉rosha|gokivathagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathagn眉musha|vathagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathagnkn眉musha|govathagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathagn眉musha|gokivathagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vathagsh毛n眉sha|vathagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govathagnksh毛n眉sha|govathagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivathagsh毛n眉sha|gokivathagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathagsh毛rosha|vathagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathagnksh毛rosha|govathagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathagsh毛rosha|gokivathagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathagsh毛musha|vathagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathagnksh毛musha|govathagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathagsh毛musha|gokivathagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vathagron眉sha|vathagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govathagnkron眉sha|govathagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivathagron眉sha|gokivathagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vathagrosh毛sha|vathagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govathagnkrosh毛sha|govathagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivathagrosh毛sha|gokivathagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vathagromusha|vathagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govathagnkromusha|govathagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivathagromusha|gokivathagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vathagmun眉sha|vathagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govathagnkmun眉sha|govathagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivathagmun眉sha|gokivathagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vathagmush毛sha|vathagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govathagnkmush毛sha|govathagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivathagmush毛sha|gokivathagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vathagmurosha|vathagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govathagnkmurosha|govathagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivathagmurosha|gokivathagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vathag|vathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙th忙g|v忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovathag|hovathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙th忙g|hov忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovathag|hohovathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙th忙g|hohov忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vathag|n眉vathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙th忙g|n眉v忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vathag|n眉n眉vathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙th忙g|n眉n眉v忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vathag|n茂vathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙th忙g|n茂v忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vathag|n茂n茂vathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙th忙g|n茂n茂v忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvathag|luvathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙th忙g|luv忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvathag|luluvathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙th忙g|luluv忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livathag|livathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙th忙g|liv忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivathag|lilivathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙th忙g|liliv忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovathag|kovathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙th忙g|kov忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovathag|kokovathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙th忙g|kokov忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevathag|kevathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙th忙g|kev忙th忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevathag|kekevathag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙th忙g|kekev忙th忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
